---
title: "model-setup"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
if (!require("easypackages")) install.packages("easypackages") #easy package manager

#install and load libraries
#In this practical we need an additional package to run the GWR models, this package is called "GWmodel"
easypackages::packages ("sf", "sp", "spdep", "spatialreg", "GWmodel", "tmap", "mapview", "car", "RColorBrewer", "cowplot", "leafsync", "leaflet.extras2", "mapview", "tidyverse", "readr", "lmtest", "tseries")

setwd(this.path::here())
```

## Data wrangling for modelling

```{r}
#clean your environment
rm(list=ls())
london_ward_data <- st_read('data/ward_poly.gpkg')

names(london_ward_data)
```

```{r}
columns_to_use <- c(
  "Subjective.well.being.average.score..2013",
  "Life.Expectancy.2009.13",
  "Childhood.Obesity.2013",
  "Incapacity.Benefit.rate...2013",
  "Unemployment.rate.2013",
  "Crime.rate...2013",
  "Deliberate.Fires...2013",
  "GCSE.point.scores...2013",
  "Unauthorised.Absence.in.All.Schools.......2013",
  "X..dependent.children.in.out.of.work.households...2013",
  "Public.Transport.Accessibility...2013",
  "Homes.with.access.to.open.space...nature..and...greenspace...2013",
  "proportion_brownfield",
  "Rail_Lden_London_55.0.59.9",
  "Rail_Lden_London_60.0.64.9",
  "Rail_Lden_London_65.0.69.9",
  "Rail_Lden_London_70.0.74.9",
  "Rail_Lden_London_..75.0",
  "Road_Lden_London_55.0.59.9",
  "Road_Lden_London_60.0.64.9",
  "Road_Lden_London_65.0.69.9",
  "Road_Lden_London_70.0.74.9",
  "Road_Lden_London_..75.0",
  "annual_ndvi_2013",
  "co2",                                                              
  "nox",                                                             
  "pm10",                                                             
  "pm2.5"
  )

new_column_names <- c(
  "SubWellBeing",
  "LifeExp",
  "ChildObesity",
  "IncBenefitRate",
  "UnempRate",
  "CrimeRate",
  "DelibFires",
  "GCSEScores",
  "UnauthAbsence",
  "DepChildUnempHouseholds",
  "PubTransAccess",
  "HomesOpenAccessNatGreen",
  "BrownfieldProp",
  "RailDen55",
  "RailDen60",
  "RailDen65",
  "RailDen70",
  "RailDen75",
  "RoadDen55",
  "RoadDen60",
  "RoadDen65",
  "RoadDen70",
  "RoadDen75",
  "NDVI",
  "CO2",
  "NOX",
  "PM10",
  "PM25",
  "geom" # For our polygons
)
length(columns_to_use)
length(new_column_names)

ward_wellbeing <- london_ward_data |> 
  dplyr::select(all_of(columns_to_use))

names(ward_wellbeing) <- new_column_names
```

```{r}
ward_wellbeing <- ward_wellbeing |> 
  mutate(RailNoise = rowSums(across(c("RailDen55", "RailDen60", "RailDen65", "RailDen70", "RailDen75",)))) |> 
  mutate(RoadNoise = rowSums(across(c("RoadDen55", "RoadDen60", "RoadDen65", "RoadDen70", "RoadDen75",))))
ward_wellbeing <- ward_wellbeing |>
  mutate(PM25_k = PM25 * 1000)
```

## Modelling

### Spatial autocorrelation?

```{r}
#creating adjacency matrix, 
ward_wellbeing_nbq <- poly2nb(ward_wellbeing, queen=TRUE) #Queen’s Contiguity neighborhood
ward_wellbeing_nbq_w <- nb2listw(ward_wellbeing_nbq, style="W", zero.policy = TRUE) #Queen’s neighborhood wights
```

```{r}
WellBeingPlot <- ggplot(data = ward_wellbeing) +
geom_density(alpha=0.8, colour="black", fill="lightblue", aes(x = SubWellBeing)) +
   theme_classic()

#plot the Green space availability variable
LifeExpPlot <- ggplot(data = ward_wellbeing) +
geom_density(alpha=0.8, colour="black", fill="green3", aes(x = HomesOpenAccessNatGreen)) +
   theme_classic()

plot_grid(WellBeingPlot, LifeExpPlot, labels = "AUTO")
```

```{r}
SubWBmap <- mapview::mapview(ward_wellbeing, zcol = "SubWellBeing", col.regions=brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd"))

HomeAcmap <- mapview::mapview(ward_wellbeing, zcol = "CrimeRate", col.regions=brewer.pal(9, "Greens"))

#Two maps with slider to compare the spatial distribution of the variables in all the neighborhoods
SubWBmap | HomeAcmap 
```

```{r}
coordsW <- ward_wellbeing |> 
  st_centroid() |> 
  st_geometry()

#let us see the adjacency matrix created by Queen’s Contiguity structure
plot(ward_wellbeing_nbq, st_geometry(coordsW), col="red")
```

```{r}
#Usually we use the moran.test function to get the Moran’s I, but that method is sensitive to irregularly distributed polygons. So we would use Monte Carlo method to bootstrap different polygon distribution. Here moran.mc() funtion does the job
mc_global <- moran.mc(ward_wellbeing$SubWellBeing, ward_wellbeing_nbq_w, 2999, alternative="greater") #here 2999 is the simulation number, if taking too long you can also use 999

#plot the  Moran’s I
plot(mc_global)
```

```{r}
mc_global
```

```{r}
# calculate the local Moran's I
gm_wellbeing_LISA <- localmoran(ward_wellbeing$SubWellBeing, ward_wellbeing_nbq_w)  #using Queen's contiguity 
summary(gm_wellbeing_LISA)
```

```{r}
# to visualize this statistic the relevant information needs to be extracted
# extract local Moran's I values and attache them to our sf object 
ward_wellbeing$gm_wellbeing_LISA <- gm_wellbeing_LISA[,1] 
# extract p-values
ward_wellbeing$gm_wellbeing_LISA_p <- gm_wellbeing_LISA[,5] 

#Here we can map the local Moran's I with t-map, and show which areas have significant clusters
map_LISA <- tm_shape(ward_wellbeing) + 
  tm_polygons(col= "gm_wellbeing_LISA", title= "Local Moran’s I", midpoint=0,
              palette = "RdYlBu", breaks= c(-10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 20))

map_LISA_p <- tm_shape(ward_wellbeing) + 
  tm_polygons(col= "gm_wellbeing_LISA_p", title= "p-values",
              breaks= c(0, 0.01, 0.05, 1), palette = "Reds")
```

```{r}
tmap_arrange(map_LISA, map_LISA_p)
```

```{r}
significanceLevel <- 0.05; # 95% confidence, define what level of significance we will accept for a cluster to be statistically significant
meanVal <- mean(ward_wellbeing$SubWellBeing); #take the mean value of the variable under consideration

gm_wellbeing_LISA_type <- gm_wellbeing_LISA #we create a new object to make sure previous reults is available to us

#create an object storing the LISA values into different classes of significance
gm_wellbeing_LISA_mapping <- gm_wellbeing_LISA_type %>% tibble::as_tibble() %>%
  magrittr::set_colnames(c("Ii","E.Ii","Var.Ii","Z.Ii","Pr(z > 0)")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(coType = dplyr::case_when(
  `Pr(z > 0)` > 0.05 ~ "Insignificant", #greater than 0.05, thus Insignificant 
  `Pr(z > 0)` <= 0.05 & Ii >= 0 & ward_wellbeing$SubWellBeing >= meanVal ~ "HH", #High-High local Moran's I values
  `Pr(z > 0)` <= 0.05 & Ii >= 0 & ward_wellbeing$SubWellBeing < meanVal ~ "LL", #Low-Low local Moran's I values
  `Pr(z > 0)` <= 0.05 & Ii < 0 & ward_wellbeing$SubWellBeing >= meanVal ~ "HL", #High-Low local Moran's I values
  `Pr(z > 0)` <= 0.05 & Ii < 0 & ward_wellbeing$SubWellBeing < meanVal ~ "LH" #Low-High local Moran's I values
))

#Join back to the main polygon data
ward_wellbeing$coType <- gm_wellbeing_LISA_mapping$coType %>% tidyr::replace_na("Insignificant")

#map it
ggplot(ward_wellbeing) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=coType)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('red','brown','NA','blue','cyan'), name='Clusters & \nOutliers') +
  labs(title = "Subjective wellbeing clusters") + 
  theme (panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'))
```

```{r}
# correlation matrix for candidate modelling variables
corr_vars <- ward_wellbeing |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  dplyr::select(
    SubWellBeing,
    LifeExp, ChildObesity, IncBenefitRate, UnempRate, CrimeRate, DelibFires,
    GCSEScores, UnauthAbsence, DepChildUnempHouseholds,
    PubTransAccess, HomesOpenAccessNatGreen, BrownfieldProp,
    RailNoise, RoadNoise, NDVI, CO2, NOX, PM10, PM25, PM25_k
  )

corr_mat <- cor(corr_vars, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")

round(corr_mat, 2)
```

```{r}
# plotting
corr_df <- as.data.frame(as.table(corr_mat))

ggplot(corr_df, aes(Var1, Var2, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(fill = "Correlation")
```

```{r}
# find highly correlated pairs
corr_pairs <- as.data.frame(as.table(corr_mat)) |>
  filter(Var1 != Var2) |>
  mutate(abs_corr = abs(Freq)) |>
  filter(abs_corr >= 0.7) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(pair = paste(sort(c(Var1, Var2)), collapse = " - ")) |>
  ungroup() |>
  distinct(pair, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  dplyr::select(pair, correlation = Freq) |>
  arrange(desc(abs(correlation)))

corr_pairs
```

### Equations

```{r}
# no spatial
eq_wellb_no_spatial <- SubWellBeing ~ LifeExp + ChildObesity + IncBenefitRate + UnempRate +
  CrimeRate + DelibFires + GCSEScores + UnauthAbsence + DepChildUnempHouseholds

eq_wellb_all_spatial<- SubWellBeing ~ LifeExp + ChildObesity + IncBenefitRate + UnempRate +
  CrimeRate + DelibFires + GCSEScores + UnauthAbsence + DepChildUnempHouseholds + PubTransAccess + HomesOpenAccessNatGreen + BrownfieldProp + RailNoise + RoadNoise + PM25_k + NDVI + NOX + CO2 + PM10

# trimmed after VIF / correlation checks
eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed <- SubWellBeing ~ LifeExp + ChildObesity + IncBenefitRate + UnempRate +  CrimeRate + DelibFires + GCSEScores + UnauthAbsence + NDVI + 
PubTransAccess + HomesOpenAccessNatGreen + BrownfieldProp + RailNoise + RoadNoise + PM25_k

# trimmed after literature review
eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed_literature <- SubWellBeing ~ LifeExp + IncBenefitRate + UnempRate + CrimeRate + GCSEScores + UnauthAbsence + PubTransAccess + HomesOpenAccessNatGreen + BrownfieldProp + RailNoise + RoadNoise + PM25_k + NDVI

# to test GCSEScores/UnauthAbsence 

eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed_literature_GCSEScores <- SubWellBeing ~ LifeExp + IncBenefitRate + UnempRate + CrimeRate + GCSEScores  + PubTransAccess + HomesOpenAccessNatGreen + BrownfieldProp + RailNoise + RoadNoise + PM25_k + NDVI

eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed_literature_UnauthAbsence <- SubWellBeing ~ LifeExp + IncBenefitRate + UnempRate + CrimeRate  + UnauthAbsence + PubTransAccess + HomesOpenAccessNatGreen + BrownfieldProp + RailNoise + RoadNoise + PM25_k + NDVI

# models to compare further
equations_vif<- list(
  no_spatial = eq_wellb_no_spatial,
  all_spatial = eq_wellb_all_spatial,
  all_spatial_trimmed = eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed,
  spatial_literature = eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed_literature,
  spatial_GCSEScores = eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed_literature_GCSEScores,
  spatial_UnauthAbsence = eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed_literature_UnauthAbsence
)

equations<- list(
  no_spatial = eq_wellb_no_spatial,
  all_spatial_trimmed = eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed,
  spatial_literature = eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed_literature,
  spatial_GCSEScores = eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed_literature_GCSEScores,
  spatial_UnauthAbsence = eq_wellb_all_spatial_trimmed_literature_UnauthAbsence
)
```

### VIF

```{r}
vif_equations <- equations_vif

vif_results <- list()

for (nm in names(vif_equations)) {
  model <- lm(vif_equations[[nm]], data = ward_wellbeing)
  vif_vals <- vif(model)
  
  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("Model:", nm, "\n")
  print(vif_vals)
  
  vif_results[[nm]] <- vif_vals
}
```

```{r}
vif_table <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(vif_results), function(nm) {
    tibble(
      Model = nm,
      Variable = names(vif_results[[nm]]),
      VIF = as.numeric(vif_results[[nm]])
    )
  })
)

vif_table |> arrange(desc(VIF))
```

```{r}
vif_flagged <- vif_table |>
  mutate(
    VIF_flag = case_when(
      VIF >= 10 ~ "Severe",
      VIF >= 5 ~ "High",
      TRUE ~ "Acceptable"
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(VIF))

vif_flagged
```

```{r}
vif_compare_trim <- vif_flagged |>
  filter(Model %in% c("all_spatial", "all_spatial_trimmed")) |>
  arrange(Variable, Model)

vif_compare_trim
```

### Basic non-spatial OLS

```{r}
run_ols_diagnostics <- function(formula, data, listw, model_name, nsim = 2999) {
  
  # fit OLS model
  model <- lm(formula, data = data)
  
  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("Model:", model_name, "\n")
  cat("Formula:\n")
  print(formula)
  
  cat("\nOLS summary:\n")
  print(summary(model))
  
  cat("\nAIC:\n")
  print(AIC(model))
  
  cat("\nVariance Inflation Factors (VIF):\n")
  print(vif(model))
  
  cat("\nDiagnostic plots:\n")
  par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
  plot(model)
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
  
  cat("\nBreusch-Pagan test:\n")
  print(bptest(model))
  
  cat("\nJarque-Bera test:\n")
  print(jarque.bera.test(residuals(model)))
  
  cat("\nResidual Moran's I (Monte Carlo):\n")
  mc_res <- moran.mc(
    residuals(model),
    listw,
    nsim = nsim,
    zero.policy = TRUE,
    alternative = "greater"
  )
  print(mc_res)
  
  # plot Moran's I simulation
  plot(mc_res)
  
  # save residuals back to sf 
  res_col <- paste0("res_", make.names(model_name))
  data[[res_col]] <- residuals(model)
  
  cat("\nResidual map:\n")
  print(qtm(data, res_col))
  
  invisible(list(
    model = model,
    moran = mc_res,
    data = data,
    residual_column = res_col
  ))
}
```

```{r}
ols_results <- list()

for (nm in names(equations)) {
  ols_results[[nm]] <- run_ols_diagnostics(
    formula = equations[[nm]],
    data = ward_wellbeing,
    listw = ward_wellbeing_nbq_w,
    model_name = nm
  )
}
```

```{r}
ols_compare_all <- tibble(
  Model = names(ols_results),
  AIC = sapply(ols_results, function(x) AIC(x$model)),
  Moran_I = sapply(ols_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$statistic))
) |>
  mutate(
    Abs_Moran_I = abs(Moran_I)
  ) |>
  arrange(AIC)

ols_compare_all
```

```{r}
best_aic_model <- ols_compare_all |>
  slice_min(AIC, n = 1)

best_moran_model <- ols_compare_all |>
  slice_min(Abs_Moran_I, n = 1)

best_aic_model
best_moran_model
```

### LM test

```{r}
run_lm_tests <- function(model, listw, model_name) {
  
  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("LM tests for model:", model_name, "\n")
  
  lm_tests <- lm.RStests(
    model,
    listw = listw,
    test = "all",
    zero.policy = TRUE
  )
  
  lm_table <- t(sapply(lm_tests, function(x) {
    c(
      Statistic = unname(x$statistic),
      df = unname(x$parameter),
      p_value = x$p.value
    )
  }))
  
  lm_table <- as.data.frame(lm_table)
  lm_table$Test <- rownames(lm_table)
  rownames(lm_table) <- NULL
  lm_table <- lm_table[, c("Test", "Statistic", "df", "p_value")]
  
  print(lm_table)
  
  invisible(lm_table)
}
```

```{r}
linearMod_no_spatial <- ols_results$no_spatial$model
linearMod_all_spatial_trimmed <- ols_results$all_spatial_trimmed$model
```

```{r}
# LM tests for the two OLS models
lmtests_no_spatial <- run_lm_tests(
  model = linearMod_no_spatial,
  listw = ward_wellbeing_nbq_w,
  model_name = "No spatial"
)

lmtests_trimmed <- run_lm_tests(
  model = linearMod_all_spatial_trimmed,
  listw = ward_wellbeing_nbq_w,
  model_name = "All spatial trimmed"
)
```

### SLM

```{r}
run_slm_diagnostics <- function(formula, data, listw, model_name,
                                nsim = 2999,
                                method = "eigen",
                                tol.solve = 1e-10,
                                fitted_model = NULL,
                                model) {
  
  # fit SLM model
  if (model == "lag"){
    slm_model <- if (is.null(fitted_model)) {
      lagsarlm(
        formula = formula,
        data = data,
        listw = listw,
        zero.policy = TRUE,
        method = method,
        tol.solve = tol.solve
      )
    } else {
      fitted_model
    }}else if (model == "sac"){
      slm_model <- if (is.null(fitted_model)) {
        sacsarlm(
          formula = formula,
          data = data,
          listw = listw,
          zero.policy = TRUE,
          method = method,
          tol.solve = tol.solve
        )
      } else {
        fitted_model
  }}
  
  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("Model:", model_name, "\n")
  cat("Formula:\n")
  print(formula(slm_model))
  
  cat("\nSLM summary:\n")
  print(summary(slm_model, Nagelkerke = TRUE))
  
  cat("\nAIC:\n")
  print(AIC(slm_model))
  
  cat("\nLog-likelihood:\n")
  print(logLik(slm_model))
  
  # residuals
  slm_resid <- residuals(slm_model)
  
  cat("\nDiagnostic plots:\n")
  par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
  
  plot(fitted(slm_model), slm_resid,
       main = "Residuals vs fitted",
       xlab = "Fitted values", ylab = "Residuals")
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2)
  
  qqnorm(slm_resid, main = "Normal Q-Q")
  qqline(slm_resid)
  
  hist(slm_resid, main = "Histogram of residuals", xlab = "Residuals")
  
  plot(slm_resid, type = "h",
       main = "Residuals by observation",
       xlab = "Observation", ylab = "Residual")
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2)
  
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
  
  cat("\nJarque-Bera test:\n")
  print(jarque.bera.test(slm_resid))
  
  cat("\nResidual Moran's I (Monte Carlo):\n")
  mc_res <- moran.mc(
    slm_resid,
    listw,
    nsim = nsim,
    zero.policy = TRUE,
    alternative = "greater"
  )
  print(mc_res)
  
  # plot Moran's I simulation
  plot(mc_res)
  
  # save residuals back to sf object 
  res_col <- paste0("res_", make.names(model_name))
  data[[res_col]] <- slm_resid
  
  cat("\nResidual map:\n")
  print(qtm(data, res_col))
  
  invisible(list(
    model = slm_model,
    moran = mc_res,
    data = data,
    residual_column = res_col
  ))
}
```

```{r}
slm_results <- list()
slm_results_sac <- list()

for (nm in names(equations)) {
  slm_results[[nm]] <- run_slm_diagnostics(
    formula = equations[[nm]],
    data = ward_wellbeing,
    listw = ward_wellbeing_nbq_w,
    model_name = nm,
    model = "lag"
  )
  slm_results_sac[[nm]] <- run_slm_diagnostics(
    formula = equations[[nm]],
    data = ward_wellbeing,
    listw = ward_wellbeing_nbq_w,
    model_name = nm,
    model = "sac"
  )
}


```

```{r}
#Best of the lag models, see table at the end of the script for full comparison
slm_compare_all <- tibble(
  Model = names(slm_results),
  AIC = sapply(slm_results, function(x) AIC(x$model)),
  Moran_I = sapply(slm_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$statistic))
) |>
  mutate(
    Abs_Moran_I = abs(Moran_I)
  ) |>
  arrange(AIC)

slm_compare_all
```

```{r}
best_slm_aic <- slm_compare_all |>
  slice_min(AIC, n = 1)

best_slm_moran <- slm_compare_all |>
  slice_min(Abs_Moran_I, n = 1)

best_slm_aic
best_slm_moran
```

### GWR stuff

```{r}
run_gwr_diagnostics <- function(formula, data_sp, listw, model_name,
                                nsim = 2999,
                                kernel = "gaussian",
                                adaptive = TRUE,
                                bw = NULL,
                                fitted_model = NULL) {
  
  # fit GWR model
  if (is.null(fitted_model)) {
    
    if (is.null(bw)) {
      bw <- bw.gwr(
        formula,
        approach = "AICc",
        adaptive = adaptive,
        kernel = kernel,
        data = data_sp
      )
    }
    
    gwr_model <- gwr.basic(
      formula,
      adaptive = adaptive,
      kernel = kernel,
      bw = bw,
      data = data_sp
    )
    
  } else {
    gwr_model <- fitted_model
    
    if (is.null(bw)) {
      bw <- gwr_model$GW.arguments$bw
    }
  }
  
  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("Model:", model_name, "\n")
  cat("Formula:\n")
  print(formula)
  
  cat("\nBandwidth:\n")
  print(bw)
  
  cat("\nKernel:\n")
  print(kernel)
  
  cat("\nGWR diagnostics:\n")
  cat("AIC:\n")
  print(gwr_model$GW.diagnostic$AIC)
  
  cat("\nAICc:\n")
  print(gwr_model$GW.diagnostic$AICc)
  
  cat("\nR2:\n")
  print(gwr_model$GW.diagnostic$gw.R2)
  
  cat("\nAdjusted R2:\n")
  print(gwr_model$GW.diagnostic$gwR2.adj)
  
  # extract SDF and convert to sf for mapping / residual work
  gwr_sf <- sf::st_as_sf(gwr_model$SDF)
  
  # identify columns
  nm <- names(gwr_sf)
  
  resid_col_found <- nm[grepl("resid|gwr.e|residual", nm, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  fitted_col_found <- nm[grepl("^pred$|predicted|prediction|yhat|fitted|fit", nm, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  observed_col_found <- nm[grepl("^y$|^obs$|observed|response", nm, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  
  # build residuals
  if (length(resid_col_found) > 0) {
    gwr_resid <- gwr_sf[[resid_col_found[1]]]
  } else if (length(observed_col_found) > 0 && length(fitted_col_found) > 0) {
    gwr_resid <- gwr_sf[[observed_col_found[1]]] - gwr_sf[[fitted_col_found[1]]]
  } else {
    stop("Could not identify GWR residuals from gwr_model$SDF.")
  }
  
  # build fitted values if available
  if (length(fitted_col_found) > 0) {
    gwr_fitted <- gwr_sf[[fitted_col_found[1]]]
  } else if (length(observed_col_found) > 0) {
    gwr_fitted <- gwr_sf[[observed_col_found[1]]] - gwr_resid
  } else {
    gwr_fitted <- seq_along(gwr_resid)
  }
  
  cat("\nDiagnostic plots:\n")
  par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
  
  plot(gwr_fitted, gwr_resid,
       main = "Residuals vs fitted",
       xlab = "Fitted values", ylab = "Residuals")
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2)
  
  qqnorm(gwr_resid, main = "Normal Q-Q")
  qqline(gwr_resid)
  
  hist(gwr_resid, main = "Histogram of residuals", xlab = "Residuals")
  
  plot(gwr_resid, type = "h",
       main = "Residuals by observation",
       xlab = "Observation", ylab = "Residual")
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2)
  
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
  
  cat("\nJarque-Bera test:\n")
  print(jarque.bera.test(gwr_resid))
  
  cat("\nResidual Moran's I (Monte Carlo):\n")
  mc_res <- moran.mc(
    gwr_resid,
    listw,
    nsim = nsim,
    zero.policy = TRUE,
    alternative = "greater"
  )
  print(mc_res)
  plot(mc_res)
  
  # save residuals to sf object 
  res_col <- paste0("res_", make.names(model_name))
  gwr_sf[[res_col]] <- gwr_resid
  
  cat("\nResidual map:\n")
  print(qtm(gwr_sf, res_col))
  
  invisible(list(
    model = gwr_model,
    bw = bw,
    moran = mc_res,
    data = gwr_sf,
    residual_column = res_col
  ))
}
```

```{r}
#Before we do any analysis for GWR we need to convert our imported sf object into a sp spatial object. As the GWmodel package usually works on sp objects
#converting the sf polygon into sp object
ward_wellbeing_sp <- as_Spatial(ward_wellbeing)
```

```{r}
gwr_results <- list()

for (nm in names(equations)) {
  gwr_results[[nm]] <- run_gwr_diagnostics(
    formula = equations[[nm]],
    data_sp = ward_wellbeing_sp,
    listw = ward_wellbeing_nbq_w,
    model_name = nm
  )
}
```

```{r}
gwr_compare_all <- tibble(
  Model = names(gwr_results),
  AIC = sapply(gwr_results, function(x) x$model$GW.diagnostic$AIC),
  AICc = sapply(gwr_results, function(x) x$model$GW.diagnostic$AICc),
  Moran_I = sapply(gwr_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$statistic))
) |>
  mutate(
    Abs_Moran_I = abs(Moran_I)
  ) |>
  arrange(AIC)

gwr_compare_all
```

```{r}
best_gwr_aic <- gwr_compare_all |>
  slice_min(AIC, n = 1)

best_gwr_moran <- gwr_compare_all |>
  slice_min(Abs_Moran_I, n = 1)

best_gwr_aic
best_gwr_moran
```

### MGWR - More improvements.

```{r}
run_mgwr_diagnostics <- function(formula, data_sp, listw, model_name,
                                 nsim = 2999,
                                 kernel = "gaussian",
                                 adaptive = TRUE,
                                 verbose = TRUE,
                                 fitted_model = NULL) {
  
  # fit MGWR model
  mgwr_model <- if (is.null(fitted_model)) {
    gwr.multiscale(
      formula,
      adaptive = adaptive,
      kernel = kernel,
      data = data_sp,
      verbose = verbose
    )
  } else {
    fitted_model
  }
  
  cat("\n====================================\n")
  cat("Model:", model_name, "\n")
  cat("Formula:\n")
  print(formula)
  
  cat("\nKernel:\n")
  print(kernel)
  
  cat("\nMGWR diagnostics:\n")
  cat("AIC:\n")
  print(mgwr_model$GW.diagnostic$AIC)
  
  cat("\nAICc:\n")
  print(mgwr_model$GW.diagnostic$AICc)
  
  cat("\nBIC:\n")
  print(mgwr_model$GW.diagnostic$BIC)
  
  cat("\nR2:\n")
  print(mgwr_model$GW.diagnostic$gw.R2)
  
  cat("\nAdjusted R2:\n")
  print(mgwr_model$GW.diagnostic$gwR2.adj)
  
  cat("\nBandwidths by parameter:\n")
  print(mgwr_model$bws.vars)
  
  # extract SDF and convert to sf for mapping / residual work
  mgwr_sf <- sf::st_as_sf(mgwr_model$SDF)
  
  # identify columns
  nm <- names(mgwr_sf)
  
  resid_col_found <- nm[grepl("resid|gwr.e|residual", nm, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  fitted_col_found <- nm[grepl("^pred$|predicted|prediction|yhat|fitted|fit", nm, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  observed_col_found <- nm[grepl("^y$|^obs$|observed|response", nm, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  
  # build residuals 
  if (length(resid_col_found) > 0) {
    mgwr_resid <- mgwr_sf[[resid_col_found[1]]]
  } else if (length(observed_col_found) > 0 && length(fitted_col_found) > 0) {
    mgwr_resid <- mgwr_sf[[observed_col_found[1]]] - mgwr_sf[[fitted_col_found[1]]]
  } else {
    stop("Could not identify MGWR residuals from mgwr_model$SDF.")
  }
  
  # build fitted values if available
  if (length(fitted_col_found) > 0) {
    mgwr_fitted <- mgwr_sf[[fitted_col_found[1]]]
  } else if (length(observed_col_found) > 0) {
    mgwr_fitted <- mgwr_sf[[observed_col_found[1]]] - mgwr_resid
  } else {
    mgwr_fitted <- seq_along(mgwr_resid)
  }
  
  cat("\nDiagnostic plots:\n")
  par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
  
  plot(mgwr_fitted, mgwr_resid,
       main = "Residuals vs fitted",
       xlab = "Fitted values", ylab = "Residuals")
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2)
  
  qqnorm(mgwr_resid, main = "Normal Q-Q")
  qqline(mgwr_resid)
  
  hist(mgwr_resid, main = "Histogram of residuals", xlab = "Residuals")
  
  plot(mgwr_resid, type = "h",
       main = "Residuals by observation",
       xlab = "Observation", ylab = "Residual")
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2)
  
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
  
  cat("\nJarque-Bera test:\n")
  print(jarque.bera.test(mgwr_resid))
  
  cat("\nResidual Moran's I (Monte Carlo):\n")
  mc_res <- moran.mc(
    mgwr_resid,
    listw,
    nsim = nsim,
    zero.policy = TRUE,
    alternative = "greater"
  )
  print(mc_res)
  plot(mc_res)
  
  # save residuals to sf object 
  res_col <- paste0("res_", make.names(model_name))
  mgwr_sf[[res_col]] <- mgwr_resid
  
  cat("\nResidual map:\n")
  print(qtm(mgwr_sf, res_col))
  
  invisible(list(
    model = mgwr_model,
    moran = mc_res,
    data = mgwr_sf,
    residual_column = res_col
  ))
}
```

```{r}
mgwr_results <- list()

for (nm in names(equations)) {
  mgwr_results[[nm]] <- run_mgwr_diagnostics(
    formula = equations[[nm]],
    data_sp = ward_wellbeing_sp,
    listw = ward_wellbeing_nbq_w,
    model_name = nm
  )
}
```

```{r}
mgwr_compare_all <- tibble(
  Model = names(mgwr_results),
  AIC = sapply(mgwr_results, function(x) x$model$GW.diagnostic$AIC),
  AICc = sapply(mgwr_results, function(x) x$model$GW.diagnostic$AICc),
  BIC = sapply(mgwr_results, function(x) x$model$GW.diagnostic$BIC),
  Moran_I = sapply(mgwr_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$statistic))
) |>
  mutate(
    Abs_Moran_I = abs(Moran_I)
  ) |>
  arrange(AIC)

mgwr_compare_all
```

```{r}
mgwr_sf <- mgwr_results$all_spatial_trimmed$data
agwr_sf <- gwr_results$all_spatial_trimmed$data

spatial_vars <- c(
  "PubTransAccess",
  "HomesOpenAccessNatGreen",
  "BrownfieldProp",
  "RailNoise",
  "RoadNoise",
  "PM25_k",
  "NDVI"
)

names(mgwr_sf)[grepl("_TV$", names(mgwr_sf))]
names(agwr_sf)[grepl("_TV$", names(agwr_sf))]
```

```{r}
mgwr_sig_maps <- list()

for (v in spatial_vars) {
  
  tv_col <- paste0(v, "_TV")
  
  tvalMGWR <- mgwr_sf %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(tv_col)) %>%
    st_drop_geometry()
  
  mgwrsig <- tvalMGWR[[1]] < -1.96 | tvalMGWR[[1]] > 1.96
  
  mgwr_sig_maps[[v]] <- tm_shape(mgwr_sf) +
    tm_fill(v, midpoint = 0) + tm_style("gray") +
    tm_layout(legend.position = c("left", "top"),
              bg.color = "white",
              frame = F,
              inner.margins = c(0, 0.4, 0, 0.4)) +
    #tm_borders()+
    tm_compass()+
    tm_scalebar()
}
```

```{r}
agwr_sig_maps <- list()

for (v in spatial_vars) {
  
  tv_col <- paste0(v, "_TV")
  
  tvalAGWR <- agwr_sf %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(tv_col)) %>%
    st_drop_geometry()
  
  agwrsig <- tvalAGWR[[1]] < -1.96 | tvalAGWR[[1]] > 1.96
  
  agwr_sig_maps[[v]] <- tm_shape(agwr_sf) +
    tm_fill(v, midpoint = 0) + tm_style("gray") +
    tm_layout(legend.position = c("right","top")) +
    tm_shape(agwr_sf[agwrsig, ]) + tm_borders()
}
```

```{r}
for (v in spatial_vars) {
  print(v)
  print(
    tmap_arrange(
      mgwr_sig_maps[[v]]
    )
  )
}
```



```{r}
#for poster
tmap_arrange(mgwr_sig_maps[c(3:6)],
             ncol = 1)

tmap_arrange(mgwr_sig_maps[c(1, 2, 7)],
             ncol = 1)
```


### Summary

```{r}
get_lm_decision <- function(model, listw) {
  lm_tests <- lm.RStests(
    model,
    listw = listw,
    test = "all",
    zero.policy = TRUE
  )
  
  rs_err_p <- lm_tests$RSerr$p.value
  rs_lag_p <- lm_tests$RSlag$p.value
  
  case_when(
    rs_err_p <= 0.05 & rs_lag_p <= 0.05 ~ "SAC",
    rs_err_p <= 0.05 & rs_lag_p > 0.05 ~ "Spatial error",
    rs_err_p > 0.05 & rs_lag_p <= 0.05 ~ "Spatial lag",
    TRUE ~ "OLS"
  )
}
```

```{r}
full.summary.table <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    step = 1,
    equation = names(ols_results),
    lagrange_decision = sapply(ols_results, function(x) {
      get_lm_decision(x$model, ward_wellbeing_nbq_w)
    }),
    AIC = sapply(ols_results, function(x) AIC(x$model)),
    mc_global = sapply(ols_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$statistic)),
    mc_global_pval = sapply(ols_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$p.value))
  ),
  tibble(
    step = 2,
    equation = names(slm_results),
    lagrange_decision = "spatial lag",
    AIC = sapply(slm_results, function(x) AIC(x$model)),
    mc_global = sapply(slm_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$statistic)),
    mc_global_pval = sapply(slm_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$p.value))
  ),
  tibble(
    step = 2,
    equation = names(slm_results_sac),
    lagrange_decision = "SAC",
    AIC = sapply(slm_results_sac, function(x) AIC(x$model)),
    mc_global = sapply(slm_results_sac, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$statistic)),
    mc_global_pval = sapply(slm_results_sac, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$p.value))
  ),
  tibble(
    step = 3,
    equation = names(gwr_results),
    lagrange_decision = NA_character_,
    AIC = sapply(gwr_results, function(x) x$model$GW.diagnostic$AIC),
    mc_global = sapply(gwr_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$statistic)),
    mc_global_pval = sapply(gwr_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$p.value))
  ),
  tibble(
    step = 4,
    equation = names(mgwr_results),
    lagrange_decision = NA_character_,
    AIC = sapply(mgwr_results, function(x) x$model$GW.diagnostic$AIC),
    mc_global = sapply(mgwr_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$statistic)),
    mc_global_pval = sapply(mgwr_results, function(x) as.numeric(x$moran$p.value))
  )
)

full.summary.table
```

```{r}
best.model <- gwr.multiscale(
      equations$all_spatial_trimmed,
      adaptive = TRUE,
      kernel = "gaussian",
      data = ward_wellbeing_sp,
      verbose = TRUE
    )

```



```{r}
best.model.sf = as.data.frame(st_as_sf(best.model$SDF))
```


```{r}
new_coef <- apply(best.model.sf[1:16], 2, median)
median_model <- best.model$lm
median_model$coefficients <- new_coef


first_quantile <- apply(best.model$lm$model, 2, function(x) quantile(x, probs = 0.25))
third_quantile <- apply(best.model$lm$model, 2, function(x) quantile(x, probs = 0.75))

mean <- apply(best.model$lm$model, 2, mean)
mean_matrix <- as.matrix(t(mean))
mean_matrix <- do.call(rbind, replicate(16, mean_matrix, simplify=FALSE))
#rownames(mean_matrix) <- colnames(mean_matrix)

diag(mean_matrix) <- first_quantile


pred_first_quantile <- predict(median_model, newdata = data.frame(mean_matrix))

diag(mean_matrix) <- third_quantile

pred_third_quantile <- predict(median_model, newdata = data.frame(mean_matrix))

diff_wellbeing_quantiles <- pred_third_quantile - pred_first_quantile

names(diff_wellbeing_quantiles) <- names(first_quantile)

long_diff_wellbeing <- diff_wellbeing_quantiles|>
  t()|>
  as.data.frame()|>
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), values_to = "Diff", names_to = "Predictors")|>
  filter(Predictors != "SubWellBeing")|>
  arrange(Diff)
  
```



```{r}
ggplot(long_diff_wellbeing)+
  geom_col(aes(x = Predictors, y = Diff))+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))


```



```{r}
second.best.model <- gwr.multiscale(
      equations$spatial_literature,
      adaptive = TRUE,
      kernel = "gaussian",
      data = ward_wellbeing_sp,
      verbose = TRUE
    )

```


```{r}
best.sac.model <- sacsarlm(
          formula = equations$spatial_UnauthAbsence,
          data = ward_wellbeing,
          listw = ward_wellbeing_nbq_w,
          zero.policy = TRUE,
          method = "eigen",
          tol.solve = 1e-10
        )
best.ols.model <- model <- lm(equations$all_spatial_trimmed, data = ward_wellbeing)
```


### Figures Appendix D
```{r}
tmap_arrange(mgwr_sig_maps)
```

```{r}

#PM2.5
tm_shape(ward_wellbeing) +
  tm_fill("PM25_k", midpoint = 0) + tm_style("gray") +
  tm_layout(legend.position = c("left", "top"),
            bg.color = "white",
            frame = F,
            inner.margins = c(0, 0.5, 0, 0.3)) +
  tm_borders()+
  tm_compass()+
  tm_scalebar()
  

#NDVI
tm_shape(ward_wellbeing) +
  tm_fill("NDVI", midpoint = 0) + tm_style("gray") +
  tm_layout(legend.position = c("left", "top"),
            bg.color = "white",
            frame = F,
            inner.margins = c(0, 0.4, 0, 0.4)) +
  tm_borders()+
  tm_compass()+
  tm_scalebar()
```
